name: Dark and Dense Chocolate Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and stir in the cocoa powder until smooth. Allow to cool.
2. Whip the cream in a chilled steel or glass bowl until stiff; set aside.
3. In a large bowl, beat the egg yolks with 1/2 cup granulated sugar until light and
fluffy. Mix in the cognac and coffee. Set aside.
4. Beat the egg whites until foamy. Gradually add the remaining granulated sugar
and beat until stiff peaks form.
5. Gently fold the cocoa mixture into the egg yolk mix. Gently fold in the egg whites.
Gently fold in the whipped cream.
6. Spoon into a serving bowl. Cover and chill overnight. Remove from the refrigerator about 30 minutes before serving.
